sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n4499" key="a)llotrioepi/skopos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀλλοτριο-επίσκοπος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n4499.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">busybody in other men's matters</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0031.tlg021.perseus-grc1:4:15" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">1 Ep.Pet.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.15</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
